summary: This is a brief memorial post published on September 11, 2002, the first anniversary of the 9/11 attacks. Joel Spolsky, based in New York City, simply links to a memorial page. The post contains no technical content or commentary, serving purely as a moment of remembrance. It reflects the deep personal impact the attacks had on the NYC tech community.
key_points: A solemn one-line memorial post marking the first anniversary of 9/11
Links to a dedicated memorial page on Joel's site
Demonstrates that some moments transcend the usual subject matter of a tech blog
key_insight: Some events are too significant for commentary — a simple link to a memorial says everything that needs to be said.
